## [00:00 - 01:08]

Hey guys, Molly here and this video is pretty simple. I'm ready for you to take action. Download the Value Journey worksheet, print it out, get a good old pen or pencil and start to fill out what you already have in place from a marketing standpoint for your business or for a client's business. This is going to start to show you where you have holes in your marketing. This is important because we can then use paid traffic throughout the rest of this course to fill those holes and to move people subtly to the next step. Download that worksheet, think about your business or the client's business that you want to work on and start filling out the boxes where you already have a marketing campaign in place and be very aware of where the opportunity is there. Alright, thanks guys. I really hope you've enjoyed this first module and I will see you in the next video.
